document.title: INNERStudios Software License Agreement
document.intro: By purchasing, downloading, or using any software, scripts, or frameworks provided by INNER Studios (operated by Afonso Hormigo Queiroz), you ("Licensee") agree to the following terms in their entirety.
document.section_1_text1: INNER Studios grants the Licensee a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, and revocable license to use the provided software for its intended purpose. All intellectual property, including but not limited to source code, branding, documentation, and digital assets, remains the sole property of INNER Studios / Afonso Hormigo Queiroz. You are granted no ownership rights, and you may not reverse-engineer, redistribute, or sublicense the software.
document.section_2_title: 2. Nature of Service & Limitation of Liability
document.section_2_text1:
INNER Studios acts strictly as a provider of technological frameworks.

No Hosting or Management: INNER Studios does not host, manage, monitor, or control any server environment created using our software. The Licensee is the sole operator of their environment.

Full Transfer of Responsibility: The Licensee assumes full, exclusive, and total legal and operational responsibility for all content, data, and activities conducted within their server. INNER Studios accepts no liability for any content hosted, transmitted, or executed by the Licensee.

No Warranty: THE SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED "AS-IS" AND "AS-AVAILABLE," WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EITHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY OR FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE. INNER Studios does not warrant that the software will be error-free or uninterrupted.

No SLA: There is no Service Level Agreement (SLA). INNER Studios provides no guarantees regarding uptime, availability, or technical performance.
document.section_3_text1:
The Licensee is strictly prohibited from using the software to facilitate:

Intellectual Property Infringement: Use of unauthorized brands, trademarks, or copyrighted materials.

Malicious Activity: Hacking, DDoSing, distributing malware, or exploiting vulnerabilities in third-party systems.

Disruptive Conduct: Spamming, mass-communication abuse, or the promotion of extreme toxicity.

Prohibited Content: Hosting or distribution of pornography, illegal substances, or any content deemed unlawful under applicable regulations.

Violations of this AUP will result in the immediate and permanent revocation of your license key without refund.
document.section_4_text1: All financial transactions for licenses or services are processed and managed exclusively through Stripe. By initiating a payment, you agree to comply with Stripe's terms of service and acknowledge that INNER Studios does not store sensitive payment card information.
document.section_5_text1: In the event of a valid legal complaint, DMCA takedown notice, law enforcement subpoena, or verified abuse report, INNER Studios will fully cooperate with authorities. This includes the disclosure of any and all relevant data, including license records, IP addresses, and the Licensee's provided contact information.
document.section_6_text1: This agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Portugal. Any disputes arising out of or in connection with this agreement shall be submitted to the exclusive jurisdiction of the competent courts in Portugal.
